assertions.assertion: The mapper returns SamlAttribute objects with custom Name values
assertions.rationale: SamlAttribute objects are created with custom urn:custom:* names.

assertions.assertion: Warns that ISamlClaimsMapper completely replaces default claim mapping — DefaultClaimMappings are not applied
assertions.rationale: Explicit warning section states ISamlClaimsMapper replaces default mapping.

assertions.assertion: Registers the custom mapper with dependency injection (e.g., AddTransient)
